headline: Find your next Seguin-area home with friendly local guidance.
subheadline: A personalized homepage mockup built around Tina Garcia’s approachable JLA Realty brand, open house activity, and direct call/text support for local buyers.
cardTitle: Open houses, local listings, and a simple next step for buyers.
cardText: Built around Tina’s active listing content, approachable tone, and Seguin-area buyer focus — with a clear path from Instagram click to phone call.
feature1Text: Turn Instagram/profile traffic into buyers who want details, showing times, or the next open house.
feature2Text: Feature homes like 816 Nodding Nixie and keep active listings from getting buried in the feed.
feature3Text: Make the next step simple with Tina’s phone number and an easy lead form for serious prospects.
areasHeadline: Local home search support across Seguin and nearby communities
areasText: This page can highlight Tina’s real service areas and listing activity so visitors instantly know where she works.
aboutHeadline: Friendly guidance for buyers who want a real person to call.
aboutText: Tina’s Instagram already feels approachable and local — family-friendly, practical, and focused on real listings. This mockup amplifies that by turning profile views into conversations, tours, and buyer leads.
compliance: Mockup only. Final site would include Tina Garcia, JLA Realty, license/brokerage details, required disclaimers, and approved listing/photo usage before launch.
testimonial: “From open houses to the right first call, make it easy for buyers to know what to do next.”
leadHeadline: Ready to look at homes around Seguin?
leadText: Share what you’re looking for and Tina can help you compare areas, listings, and next steps.
